plugin.name: Workflow Visualizer
plugin.description: IDE-native preview and analysis for Serverless Workflow (.sw.json) files. Renders a live PlantUML state diagram in a side tool window, contributes PSI references for navigation and rename, ships eight inspections with quick-fixes, semantic coloring, mutation badges, and dead-code dimming. No browser, no Graphviz, no server.
plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 — Initial release.
  • Live PlantUML diagram with bidirectional navigation.
  • Eight inspections + quick-fixes (missing / duplicate / unreachable / unused / terminal / switch / event-timeout).
  • PSI references: Go to Declaration, Find Usages, Rename.
  • Gutter usage popup, hover preview, semantic coloring.
  • Mutation badges, dead-code dimming, SVG / PUML export.
